creator: imura@af.airnet.ne.jp
text:
> Would you like me to try upgrading kdevelop-i18n for you? This way, it'll
> get into the tree before 4.0-RELEASE. Let me know if there's anything
> particularly different about the -i18n port.

Yes, please. :)

- From kdevelop-1.0

  o No PATCHFILES/EXTRA_PATCHS required. All of them are included
    in this release.

- Difference between mine and yours

  o Name of libralies. (See old patch-aa)
  o CONFIGURE_ENV=X_EXTRA_LIBS="-lxpg4" - do not forget this argument.

What about c_c++_reference.tar.gz ?
I think it's better to include into this port.
Or create a new port to install the documents?

-- R. Imura
// my private mail address has changed.
// imura@cs.titech.ac.jp ====> imura@af.airnet.ne.jp /(-.-)y-~~
